must_have_fields.name: order_id
must_have_fields.requirement: Invoice must identify the order it bills.
must_have_fields.implementation_hint: Add invoices.order_id as a required foreign key to orders.id and expose order_id in create/get/list invoice contract messages.

must_have_relationships.name: order_to_invoices
must_have_relationships.requirement: One order can have many invoices; each invoice belongs to one order.
must_have_relationships.implementation_hint: Use invoices.order_id -> orders.id. Add an index on invoices.order_id. Do not add a unique constraint on order_id.
